ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team's coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the team's coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the game */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g. regular, playoff, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES game_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, umpire) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "umpire_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the umpire */,
  "umpire_email" TEXT /* Email address of the umpire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the umpire was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the umpire was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_umpires_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the game */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES game_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
